name: Team Tomlinson
subject: "bring the right kind of people in"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Help us STOP the un-American Trump-Perdue immigration proposal.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em051819b&noskip=true]

Dear Friend –
Cheered on by David Perdue, the White House has unveiled a newer, more discriminatory immigration policy conveniently after the president’s own family members benefited from the opportunity now sought to be denied others. They seek an immigration system which de-prioritizes families and allows in only those whom Trump and Perdue deem to be the “right kind of people” — ignoring entirely the American tradition of offering a home to the tired, the poor, and the huddled masses “yearning to breathe free.”
Perdue rejects America as the shining beacon of hope for immigrants and attacks the American Dream that this immigrant nation built. Rush a $5 donation to Teresa’s campaign right now so we can send a message that elitist and discriminatory immigration policies won’t be tolerated from Georgia’s US Senator. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em051819b&noskip=true]
The American Dream that our immigration system is supposed to represent is one where anyone can succeed, no matter their educational attainment or socioeconomic status when they first arrive here.
The American immigration system has always been about those scrappy and passionate enough to believe in the American Dream. Those are the immigrants who have made this country great from our earliest days — whether they are highly educated or not, poor or wealthy. But David Perdue doesn’t want to afford others the same opportunities that were given to the president’s own immigrant family.
Our immigration system needs fixing, for sure. But this proposal doesn’t even mention the 1.5 million Dreamers - 21,600 of whom call Georgia home - who have been kept in legal limbo thanks to this administration’s own actions. We need to focus on the people, the farmers, engineers, and entrepreneurs, and the common humanity of a compassionate immigration system that serves everyone.
As your Senator, Teresa is going to put families first, protect DREAMers, and ensure we’re building a strong, prosperous economy that lifts up everyone. Pitch in $5 right now so we can respond to Perdue’s offensive comments and elect leaders committed to an immigration system that reflects the American Dream. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em051819b&noskip=true]
Thank you,
Team Tomlinson
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-perdue?refcode=em051819b&noskip=true]

clean_body: Help us STOP the un-American Trump-Perdue immigration proposal. DONATE [] Dear Friend – Cheered on by David Perdue, the White House has unveiled a newer, more discriminatory immigration policy conveniently after the president’s own family members benefited from the opportunity now sought to be denied others. They seek an immigration system which de-prioritizes families and allows in only those whom Trump and Perdue deem to be the “right kind of people” — ignoring entirely the American tradition of offering a home to the tired, the poor, and the huddled masses “yearning to breathe free.” Perdue rejects America as the shining beacon of hope for immigrants and attacks the American Dream that this immigrant nation built. Rush a $5 donation to Teresa’s campaign right now so we can send a message that elitist and discriminatory immigration policies won’t be tolerated from Georgia’s US Senator. [] The American Dream that our immigration system is supposed to represent is one where anyone can succeed, no matter their educational attainment or socioeconomic status when they first arrive here. The American immigration system has always been about those scrappy and passionate enough to believe in the American Dream. Those are the immigrants who have made this country great from our earliest days — whether they are highly educated or not, poor or wealthy. But David Perdue doesn’t want to afford others the same opportunities that were given to the president’s own immigrant family. Our immigration system needs fixing, for sure. But this proposal doesn’t even mention the 1.5 million Dreamers - 21,600 of whom call Georgia home - who have been kept in legal limbo thanks to this administration’s own actions. We need to focus on the people, the farmers, engineers, and entrepreneurs, and the common humanity of a compassionate immigration system that serves everyone. As your Senator, Teresa is going to put families first, protect DREAMers, and ensure we’re building a strong, prosperous economy that lifts up everyone. Pitch in $5 right now so we can respond to Perdue’s offensive comments and elect leaders committed to an immigration system that reflects the American Dream. body:
President Trump outlined his proposal for reforming America’s broken immigration system this week. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4c879796d4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Why Trump’s Immigration Speech is a Game-Changer](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe2af097dc&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Even before the president did a microphone check for his immigration and border security speech in the White House Rose Garden Thursday afternoon, his critics were saying they hated his plan,” James Carafano writes. “Good. That means he must be more right than wrong.” President Trump outlined his proposal for reforming America’s broken immigration system this week, transforming “the legal system first to one bringing in workers based on merit.”

🎬 **Watch:** [A fair, modern, and lawful immigration system for America!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=844fc804d2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [White House Launches Survey Looking for Tech Industry Bias](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=819e2dcee4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
On the heels of numerous claims of political bias within some of America’s most powerful tech companies, “the White House has launched an online form asking people to share their experiences if they think political partisanship has led them to be silenced by social media sites,” Barbara Ortutay reports.

**Share your story:** [The Trump Administration is fighting for free speech online.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05fe5fe25c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump Wins Pledge to Train 1 Million More Workers, 9 Million So Far](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3674f8fda7&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Ivanka Trump is on a roll in her campaign to win pledges from American companies to train workers for well-paying jobs,” Paul Bedard reports. “In her latest stop this week . . . she won a promise to help train 1 million new salesmen and women. It came during a visit to Salesforce, the cloud-based customer management system, during which CEO Marc Benioff doubled his plan to provide training for 500,000.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Honors Fallen Officers at Capitol Hill Memorial Service](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f46c841956&e=3ee4985eea)
-CBS News
“President Trump said he stands with law enforcement during the Annual National Peace Officers' Memorial Service on Capitol Hill, an event to honor law enforcement officers who have died on the line of duty,” CBS News reports. “Today we renew our solemn oath that we will never forget,” the President said alongside families of fallen officers.

🎬 **More:** [President Trump speaks at Peace Officers’ Memorial Service](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=266e028697&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Why Free Traders and All Americans Should Back Trump on China Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ed5c7c501&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“If ever there were a right time to impose punitive tariffs, it is now, and it is against China,” economic expert Stephen Moore writes. “This is the right moment to shut down China’s abusive trade practices forever.” Here is the essential fact you don’t hear from the media: “The average tariff that we imposed on China when Trump entered the White House was about 4 percent. China’s tariffs on us were about 10 percent,” Moore says.
---
|
---
| [Bull Durham at Justice](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7421d46d4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Attorney General William Barr has tasked U.S. Attorney John Durham to investigate the origins of the Trump-Russia investigation. If the Justice Department had done this two years ago, the country would be in a much better place,” Kimberly Strassel writes. “The esteemed duo can give the public confidence that Justice and FBI actions are getting a fair and thorough look.”
---
|
---
| [How the Trump Prescription for Drug Prices Transparency Could Make Health Care Well Again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a75b4e88f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
“Nothing better illustrates the insanity of the nation’s health care system than the drug ads people watch . . . Not only are you paying for the cost of developing and marketing drugs for other people, you have to sit through the ads that try to persuade those people to buy those drugs, which then pushes up your insurance premiums,” the _USA Today_ editorial board writes. “The Trump administration, to its credit, has a plan that could stimulate this debate . . . Starting this summer, ads for drugs costing at least $35 per month will have to include their prices.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Touts American Energy in Cameron](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=638f01af55&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
“President Donald Trump showcased his ‘America First energy policy’ on Tuesday during a trip to Louisiana designed to highlight his administration’s efforts to increase liquefied natural gas exports and boost the country’s energy infrastructure,” _The Associated Press_ reports. “Under my administration we have ended the war on America energy and ended the economic assault on our wonderful energy workers,” the President said.

🎬 **President Trump:** [“We have ended the war on American energy.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d6ef37abc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Why I Support James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I'm writing to tell you that Andrea and I are supporting James Mackler for the US Senate seat that will be decided in November 2020.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2aa/18d6a294/4a690491/26d69e68/1442272899/VEsH/ "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Dear friend, **I 'm writing to tell you that Andrea and I are supporting James Mackler for the US Senate seat** that will be decided in November 2020. This is the open seat that Sen. Alexander is vacating. I got to know James well during my own race for the Senate last year. He had begun campaigning for that seat himself and graciously stepped aside when I entered the race. He then did everything he could to support me; he was at my events, he spoke on my behalf, he offered excellent advice. He was a class act in every way. I shouldn't have been surprised: remember that this is a man who enlisted in the US Army after 9/11 because he felt he needed to do something for his country. As a 30-year old attorney, he closed his practice, got an age waiver, learned to fly a Black Hawk helicopter, and became a _Screaming Eagle_ in the 101st Airborne Division. That kind of stepping forward, when no one would have expected you to do so, is true selflessness and love of country. We need a lot more of it in Washington. With James' background, his genuine personality and his likeability, he will be an excellent candidate and a man Tennessee can be proud to send to Washington. [**_Finally, money: Andrea and I have each given the legal maximum to his campaign --$5,600 each. clean_body: I'm writing to tell you that Andrea and I are supporting James Mackler for the US Senate seat that will be decided in November 2020. | "" | | Dear friend, I 'm writing to tell you that Andrea and I are supporting James Mackler for the US Senate seat that will be decided in November 2020. This is the open seat that Sen. Alexander is vacating. I got to know James well during my own race for the Senate last year. He had begun campaigning for that seat himself and graciously stepped aside when I entered the race. He then did everything he could to support me; he was at my events, he spoke on my behalf, he offered excellent advice. He was a class act in every way. I shouldn't have been surprised: remember that this is a man who enlisted in the US Army after 9/11 because he felt he needed to do something for his country. As a 30-year old attorney, he closed his practice, got an age waiver, learned to fly a Black Hawk helicopter, and became a Screaming Eagle in the 101st Airborne Division. That kind of stepping forward, when no one would have expected you to do so, is true selflessness and love of country. We need a lot more of it in Washington. With James' background, his genuine personality and his likeability, he will be an excellent candidate and a man Tennessee can be proud to send to Washington. "" You can take care of that right here! name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Can you take our short survey?
body:
The results help guide our campaign.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY)

**Please take a moment to complete our latest, official issues survey. We’ll compile your answers and make sure Bernie sees the results this week.**

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190518-1-v1-30&refcode2=1394.150750.co5mjY}&t=2&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY)

* * *
Friends -
Shortly after we launched our campaign, we sent around a survey to check in on the issues you’re paying the most attention to on this campaign.
We reviewed the results and shared them internally. And we’ve made sure that they’re reflected in the ideas we talk about online and on the trail.
But now that three months have passed since our launch, we think it is an especially important time to check back in to see if anything has changed.
The survey questions are the same, so your participation helps us track how people’s opinions have shifted over the course of our campaign. **This helps us run a better campaign. So please take a minute to sound off:**
**[Can you take a minute to complete our latest, official issues survey? We’ll compile the feedback and make sure Bernie gets the results.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190518-1-v1-30&refcode2=1394.150750.co5mjY}&t=3&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190518-1-v1-30&refcode2=1394.150750.co5mjY}&t=4&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY)
**Here’s the first question:**
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190518-1-v1-30&refcode2=1394.150750.co5mjY}&t=5&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY)
It wasn’t long ago that the issues and ideas we were talking about were considered too radical and too extreme. Today, those ideas are supported by the vast majority of the American people.
And that all starts with knowing the issues you care about, and coming up with solutions to address them.
So please, take a moment to tell us the issues you're tracking on this campaign. Use this link:
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/survey**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190518-1-v1-30&refcode2=1394.150750.co5mjY}&t=6&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY)
Thanks for answering this call to action.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=1394_150750_co5mjY&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=10&akid=1394%2E150750%2Eco5mjY).

name: Cory Booker
subject: You still have the chance to be a founding donor before the next phase of this campaign
body:
| | |
---
| Team, in a few moments, I'm going to ask you to chip in to my campaign for president. But first, let's take a step back. I know you get a lot of these kinds of emails -- and you deserve to know why your donation truly matters to our campaign, especially right now. The truth is, at the end of this month, we turn the corner into a new phase of this election. The first debates are in June, and that will be the first chance for an underdog campaign like ours to stand out in the crowd of 23 candidates. **That means this moment is our last chance to build this operation before we put it to the test on the national stage.** We have plans to open new offices, hire dozens of organizers and interns (yes, we pay our interns!), and lay the groundwork for what comes next. I know fully well that other campaigns have it easier than we do. The focus is on the frontrunners in this race who are raking in millions of dollars, thanks in part to the attention they get. They'll have all the money they need to compete. **We don 't have that guarantee.** We haven't spent years building an online donor base. And from the start, our campaign has refused corporate PAC money and donations from D.C. lobbyists. Because if you want to govern the right way, you've got to campaign the right way, too. That's why these monthly fundraising deadlines mean a whole lot more to me than they do to many others in this field. We rely on people like you to give us a fighting chance. I can't tell you how much it means to see people who believe enough in me and what we're building to chip in right now -- at a moment when the spotlight has yet to shine on us. But I believe that, with your help, that spotlight will find us. We'll make the most of the June debates and the important organizing work on the ground. Right now, I need to ask directly, because it matters: [_**Will you become a founding donor before our next phase of this campaign? Chip in today by clicking this link:**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190518-em?refcode=em_fr_20190518_CB_20190518-fr-CB-eom1-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190518-em](https://act.corybooker. subject: A bit behind
body:
But I think we can turn it around.
| | |
---
Peter,
Kirsten emailed you yesterday setting a fundraising goal for us for this weekend: 1,000 new donors by midnight tonight.
Right now, we're a bit behind that goal, but I think we can turn it around before I report back to KG.
Will you help us get back on track? **[Donate right now to help hit today's goal, guarantee Kirsten is on the debate stage and power this campaign forward to defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977377/2ae112ef/68bf74da/357c40cb/1911157073/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3106-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

We have a steep uphill climb ahead of us, but hitting our goal and having you on board means this: Kirsten can campaign in more early states. She's heading to Iowa for the next _three weekends in a row_ to pound the pavement--because when she gets in a room with people, she can win hearts and minds. I've seen it, and it's how we're going to win this thing: voter by voter, coffee shop by coffee shop.
We can spread our message even further by **[securing Kirsten's spot on the national debate stage](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977377/2ae112ef/68bf74da/357c40cb/1911157073/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3106-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****[.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977377/2ae112ef/68bf74da/357c40cb/1911157073/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3106-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** With 23 declared candidates now in the race, we need to pull out all the stops to absolutely guarantee Kirsten will be on that stage.
It all has to start now. It has to start with you chipping in to hit our goal and power this movement. **[We need 572 more people to become donors by midnight tonight--and every donation gets Kirsten one step closer to the debate stage. No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no super PACs--we're counting on you.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977377/2ae112ef/68bf74da/357c40cb/1911157073/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3106-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for being brave with us,

Jess

Jess Fassler
Campaign Manager
Gillibrand 2020

name: Fran
subject: Armed Forces Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | Today is Armed Forces Day, a chance to honor and pay tribute to those who have served our country in any branch of our military.

As a veteran myself, I want to convey my unending gratitude to every person who served in defense of our great country.

Serving my country is a foundational part of who I am. It's why I'm running for Congress to serve the people of Central New York.

But I'm just one of the millions of Americans who have taken time out of their lives to defend our nation. I hope you'll join me and take a moment today to thank our service members and veterans for their sacrifices.

Yours in service,
Fran

|
---|---|---

|
---

---

**I need to level with you... **

Asking hard-working folks like you for money is not easy for me. I know every dollar is precious to your family.

**But I also have to be realistic... **

I refuse to take a single dime from corporate PACs. Which means you are the true driving force behind my race.

**And to be perfectly honest...**

Since you helped me make history and qualify for the first Presidential debate, I've seen a decline in fundraising. We're short on resources to keep my campaign going.

**I know I 've asked you for so much already... **

But now that you've pushed my campaign to the front of the pack, I wouldn't be asking again if your support wasn't absolutely critical to staying competitive.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This decision makes your support even more powerfully important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We have a real opportunity right now in a Democratic primary to build a campaign from the grassroots up. And our grassroots movement will be our big advantage. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa3b/45c30650/9941a956/66996465/4027333774/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
When we started this presidential campaign, I saw two options for how we could run it:
1. Focus on building a grassroots movement entirely with grassroots donors and volunteers.

2. Or spend a lot time with wealthy people behind closed doors, and then hope we have enough money to buy a bunch of TV ads right before voting starts.

For me, the choice was clear. I picked option #1.

Here's what that looks like: I'm not doing any high-dollar private fundraisers with millionaires and corporate executives.

I don't take any corporate PAC money, or PAC money of any kind. I don't take any Washington lobbyist money. And I'm not out sucking up to a bunch of billionaires hoping that they're going to run a Super PAC for me.

**[In other words, we're running this movement with grassroots donors and grassroots volunteers. That makes your support even more powerfully important. If you think this is the best way to run a campaign, we need you to be in this fight -- can you chip in right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa3b/45c30650/9941a956/66996464/4027333774/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE4ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190518em1-full")**

We have a real opportunity right now in a Democratic primary to build a campaign from the grassroots up.

And you know what? If we seize that opportunity, our grassroots movement will be our big advantage when we roll into the general election in 2020.

That means we'll get a better chance at winning the White House.

We'll be more ready to win up and down the ballot -- to keep the House, get control of the Senate, and take back more state houses. When you build from the grassroots, it helps everybody who's in the fight, not just in the presidential race.

Our grassroots movement will bring the energy we need to make big, structural change -- the change we need so that someone like the guy in the White House never gets elected president again.

**It 's the right way to run, and the best way to win. But person-to-person, face-to-face organizing takes real resources.

[So what do you say? Can you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford so we can keep growing our movement? Side by side, you and me -- this is how we'll win.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa3b/45c30650/9941a956/66996464/4027333774/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE4ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190518em1-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa3b/45c30650/9941a956/66996464/4027333774/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE4ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190518em1-full")

body:
Before midnight, will you sign your name next to mine to tell every climate change-denying, anti-environment Republican in Congress holding us back that we DEMAND action on climate change? >>
---
| | [I've endorsed the Green New Deal. Will you sign your name next to mine and endorse it, too? I need 10,000 fellow endorsers before midnight. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b564/18e32a7f/5b3f1443/7b981450/946850516/VEsH/ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/environmental-survey?source=20190518_em_pet_b1_lujan_all") | The science is clear -- we're running out of time.

Our planet is getting dangerously warm, 1 million species are on the brink of extinction, and they've found plastic trash in the depths of the ocean. We're facing a climate crisis. **Which is why I 've endorsed the Green New Deal. ** [_**I need 10,000 fellow endorsers before midnight to show every climate change-denying Republican just how powerful the movement to protect our planet can be. >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b564/18e32a7f/5b3f1443/7b981450/946850516/VEsE/ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/environmental-survey?source=20190518_em_pet_b1_lujan_all") ****NAME: ****dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b564/18e32a7f/5b3f1443/7b981450/946850516/VEsF/ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/environmental-survey?source=20190518_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")**
---

I've read the reports. I believe the science. I won't allow us to wait another generation to act.

It's stunning. The science could not be more clear. Our planet is getting dangerously warm, 1 million species are at risk of extinction -- they've even found plastic garbage on the depths of the ocean floor.

Our entire way of life is at risk because of climate change.

**Which is why I just endorsed the critical Green New Deal. **

And why I need 10,000 fellow endorsers to back me up.

[_**Before midnight, will you sign your name next to mine to tell every climate change-denying, anti-environment Republican in Congress holding us back that we DEMAND action on climate change? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b564/18e32a7f/5b3f1443/7b981450/946850516/VEsC/ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/environmental-survey?source=20190518_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")

The time for talk is over. Our planet is deteriorating. And I'm not going to just sit around and watch it happen.

I'm counting on you to stand with me,

-Ben Ray Lujan

body:

---
| Team Bennet, we need to hear from you!

Every day, Michael Bennet's campaign is focused on building opportunity for Americans and restoring integrity to Washington.

President Trump has been attacking our democratic values on all fronts. He's counting on scandals and controversy to keep everyone distracted when he tries to gut social safety nets, slash taxes for the wealthiest people in our country, and strip millions of their health care.
